openFindings.title: Tier 3 prompt still exposes the internal drop_candidate alias
openFindings.description: The public 8-category prompt contract still includes the internal drop_candidate alias and the prompt-shape test freezes that wording.

openFindings.title: Continuity paragraph discloses more internal topology to Tier 3
openFindings.description: The added continuity paragraph now discloses the resume ladder and canonical continuity host to the external classifier, but no secrets are exposed.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still points at the old 010 segment
openFindings.description: The packet now lives under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but description.json.parentChain still records 010-search-and-routing-tuning.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata key_files mixes canonical and broken shorthand paths
openFindings.description: derived.key_files contains both canonical repo-relative paths and unresolved shorthand duplicates such as mcp_server/... and tests/....

openFindings.title: graph-metadata entities retain anchor markup and noise tokens
openFindings.description: derived.entities still contains low-signal values such as a and raw heading text with anchor comments.

openFindings.title: metadata_only reaches implementation-summary only after save-handler alias resolution
openFindings.description: The packet describes implementation-summary.md as the canonical metadata_only target, but the router-level contract and tests still publish the spec-frontmatter alias and rely on memory-save.ts to translate it.
